description_long: This is a pair of athletic running shoes in a vibrant coral pink color, featuring a mesh upper for breathability and synthetic overlays for structure. The shoes have three dark stripes on the sides, characteristic of Adidas branding, and a white cushioned midsole that appears to be made from foam for comfort and shock absorption. The outsoles are slightly dirty, indicating use, and have a textured tread for grip. The laces are standard criss-cross style, and the tongue and heel collar are padded for added support. The shoes show some signs of wear, particularly on the soles and around the toe area, but remain structurally intact. Logos are visible on the tongue and heel, reinforcing the brand identity.
description: A pair of coral pink athletic running shoes with dark side stripes, white cushioned midsoles, and visible signs of use. The shoes feature mesh uppers, standard lacing, and prominent Adidas branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing both shoes, highlighting the mesh toe box, laces, and Adidas logo on the tongue.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the three dark stripes, white midsole, and overall shoe profile.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the padded heel collars, Adidas branding on the heel, and some dirt on the outsole.
description_view_3: Right side view with three dark stripes, mesh upper, and the full length of the white midsole visible.
attribute_logo: Adidas logo on the tongue and heel, triangular shape, white color
